title: The Last Voyage of the Harpy Express

### A train murder mystery social game

### How to play
You will need to host a server with the mods and map provided with the modpack. World needs to be in peaceful, adventure mode, allow PvP and command blocks.
The game requires at least 6 people to play, but the recommended amount is 12 to 14. To get ready for the game, physically board the train in the lobby. Once 6+ players are boarded, you can ring the horn to start the game. If you wish to spectate, simply do not board the train.

#### Need a server? Use code RAT on Nodecraft for 30% off your first month!
https://nodecraft.com/r/rat
